title: Can I have groups with different columns?
excerpt:
I would like to have many groups with different columns on the same board. 
is it possibale ?

posts.author: ronen (gershkovich)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to have many groups with different columns on the same board.
is it possibale ?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ronen - this is not currently possible, all columns created will be across the board in all groups. You can use views to hide columns/groups, etc however these are board wide.

Thanks,
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

posts.author: DMC (Dereine Coleman)
posts.cookedHtml: Is this something that is being considered?
